noise: Anthropic's top lawyer suggests the billable hour may be nearing its end due to AI's impact on legal service delivery. This signals a potential shift in law firm compensation models.
translation: For independent European law firms, this isn't just tech talk. It means clients will expect more value, not just more hours. Your firm's survival hinges on leveraging AI to deliver fixed-fee services or alternative models efficiently, before your competitors do. The old ways are becoming unsustainable.
action: I can help you audit your current workflows to identify where Microsoft 365 Copilot, already paid for, can cut billable hours by 15-20% *today*, without sending client data to US servers. Let's make your firm future-ready, compliantly.
